cooperates.cooperate_desc: Angela is a great partner for Harith because her ultimate Heartguard gives him a shield and extra sustain while he dives into fights. Harith often takes risks when using Zaman Force and dashing between enemies so Angela protection allows him to survive longer and deal more damage. Angela skills also provide healing and crowd control to support Harith in team fights. With Angela attached Harith becomes harder to kill and can maximize his mobility and burst potential making them a very strong combo.

counters.counter_desc: Kaja is a strong counter to Harith because his ultimate Divine Judgment can suppress Harith completely. Suppression prevents Harith from using his dashes or escaping, so Harith cannot use Zaman Force to escape. Kaja can also pull Harith into his team, allowing allies to burst Harith down before he can use his combos. For these reasons Kaja reliably stops Harith and his aggressive playstyle.

dominants.dominant_desc:
In the late game, Harith can carry team fights if played carefully. Position well and wait for enemies to use their control skills before engaging. Use Zaman Force in the middle of team fights and keep dashing to deal continuous damage. Focus on enemy damage dealers and avoid getting locked down

During the mid game, Harith becomes stronger with items. Rotate with your team and join fights to maximize the power of Zaman Force. Always look for opportunities to dash between enemies to reset skills. Target the enemy backline and use lifesteal to sustain in fights.

In the late game, Harith can carry team fights if played carefully. Position well and wait for enemies to use their control skills before engaging. Use Zaman Force in the middle of team fights and keep dashing to deal continuous damage. Focus on enemy damage dealers and avoid getting locked down

emblems.emblem_desc: Mage Emblem with Impure Rage is the best choice for Harith because it increases his magic damage and provides mana regeneration when hitting enemies with skills. This allows him to spam Chrono Dash and other skills more often without running out of mana. The extra damage from Impure Rage also helps him poke enemies in the lane and deal consistent burst damage during team fights. With this emblem, Harith can fully use his mobility and become a strong carry in the mid and late game.

equips.equip_desc: I chose this build for Harith to maximize his damage and sustain while keeping his mobility. Magic Boots give cooldown reduction for more skill spam. Starlinium Scythe provides lifesteal and mana sustain. Feather of Heaven adds attack speed and extra magic damage on basic attacks. Holy Crystal boosts his burst damage. Concentrated Energy gives lifesteal and survivability in fights. Divine Glaive adds high magic penetration to deal damage even against tanky enemies. This build makes Harith strong in both duels and team fights with continuous dashes.

hero.hero_overview: Harith is a highly mobile mage hero in Mobile Legends who excels in dealing burst magic damage and chasing down enemies. He is often played in the Gold Lane or Mid Lane, where he can farm quickly and scale into a strong damage dealer. With his skill set, Harith can dash in and out of fights using Chrono Dash and unleash massive damage through Zaman Force, making him a strong threat in both skirmishes and team fights. His role in the game focuses on farming efficiently in the early game, harassing enemies with his mobility, and carrying fights in the mid to late game with his high burst potential.
hero.hero_strength: Harith has strong mobility and continuous damage output. His passive reduces the duration of crowd control effects, giving him better survivability compared to other mages. In the lane, he can clear minion waves quickly and poke enemies with his combos, making him hard to zone out. During team fights, Harith becomes a big threat when his Zaman Force is active, allowing him to spam Chrono Dash and Synchro Fission to burst down multiple enemies. He scales well with items, making him a reliable carry in the mid and late game. His chase potential also makes it difficult for enemies to escape once he locks them down.
hero.hero_weakness: Harith can be vulnerable if he dives recklessly into fights, since he can be burst down quickly by enemies with strong crowd control. He depends on proper positioning and timing, so a single mistake can cost him his life. In the early game, he is weaker if denied gold or pressured heavily, which delays his core items. He also relies on cooldowns, meaning if he misses his skills, he becomes less effective in battle. Heroes with reliable crowd control such as Chou, Kaja, and Franco can easily stop him before he can use his combos.

data.recommend: This guide shows the best build and strategy for Harith.

spell.spell_desc: Purify is another strong option for Harith when facing enemy teams with heavy crowd control. It removes all disabling effects and grants short immunity, allowing Harith to keep spamming his skills inside Zaman Force without being stopped. This spell is highly effective against lineups with stuns, suppressions, or immobilizing effects

hero.hero_overview: Harith, as a mid-to-late game mage, excels in the gold lane, but can also be effective in the mid lane. His farming route should prioritize maximizing gold and experience through minion and jungle monster kills, while also rotating to assist teammates in team fights and objectives.
hero.hero_strength: His strength lies in his ability to dash around the battlefield, making him difficult to catch, and his ultimate reduces the duration of crowd control effects on him, further enhancing his survivability.
hero.hero_weakness: Harith's primary weakness is crowd control and heroes with strong burst damage or anti-dash abilities. His reliance on cooldown reduction can make him vulnerable in the early game.

spell.spell_desc: Purify can quickly remove the crowd control effects and give you a short time of immunity.

hero.hero_overview: Harith is a powerful hero and can be played in any way if you know how to use him.
hero.hero_strength: This hero has explosive damage that can crush heroes with low durability and has an ultimate skill that makes both of his skills almost timeless. Harith's fusion starts in the mid to late game.
hero.hero_weakness: Despite the strength of this hero, there are several counters to him, including suppression. If he is suppressed in the middle of the battle, the opponents can take advantage of the opportunity and kill him, so it is preferable to use Harith when the enemies have the least number of stans or suppression.

hero.hero_overview: Harith is one of the heroes who are difficult to learn, but he is one of the strongest heroes at the end of the match. Harith is a Leonine and the best path for him is the path of magicians or the path of gold. Harith's shield at the end of the match after using the ultimate skill And the second skill is very large and he will have a reduction in the waiting time for the second skill and his magic damage will be very strong at the end of the match.I recommend practicing it.
hero.hero_strength: Harith is characterized by his high damage and his strength in team fights. He is also strong from the beginning of the match to the end, which makes the hero special, in addition to the possibility of using the hero in all paths, the jungle path, the gold path, the middle path, as he can pay many places and the strength of dodging enemies while fighting with them due to his second renewable ability and its high damage.
hero.hero_weakness: The hero is a bit weak without his ultimate ability and it is true that the hero is strong in group battles but if he is left without team protection he will become weak and if two enemy heroes meet he will be their prey and the most prominent opponents for him are the armored ones (Tigerl/Khafra/Franco/Kaga) and warriors like (Monstar/Yuzong/Vovicius) and archers with explosive damage (Brody/Moscow/Beatrix).

spell.spell_desc: One of the best spells is the (Revenge/Purification/Forest Claw) spell, and I prefer revenge and purification because they help him a lot.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Diggie removes the Crowd Control effect and provides an extra shield. Diggie can also open up the map so Harith can farm more safely.

Indonesia : Diggie dapat melepas efek Crowd Control dan memberikan extra shield. Diggie juga dapat membuka map agar Harith dapat melakukan farming dengan lebih aman.

counters.counter_desc:
Minsitthar has skills that are very detrimental to Harith. Harith cannot use his skills in Minsitthar's ultimate area, while Harith must spam skills (using skills continuously).

Indonesia : Minsitthar memiliki skill yang sangat merugikan Harith. Harith tidak dapat menggunakan skill-skillnya didalam area ultimate Minsitthar, sedangkan Harith harus melakukan spam skill (menggunakan skill terus-menerus).

Just like Minsitthar, Kufra has a 2 skill that can hurt Harith. But not as difficult as against Minsitthar. Kufra can cancel Harith's dash (skill 2) if Harith's dash bumped into Kufra's second's skill.

Indonesia : Sama seperti Minsitthar, Kufra memiliki skill 2 yang dapat merugikan Harith. Namun tidak sesulit melawan Minsitthar. Kufra dapat membatalkan penggunaan dash Harith (skill 2) jika dash Harith menabrak skill 2 milik kufra.

Harith is quite difficult against Lunox, especially Lunox Gold Lane. Lunox can easily escape and avoid Harith's attacks when Harith uses the ultimate. Lunox can also burst continuously to Harith.
In essence, lunox ultimate has 2 modes and both are very detrimental to harith. But it still depends on the game situation and the user. Lunox does not win forever against Harith, depending on how the player uses his hero well.

Indonesia : Harith cukup kesulitan melawan Lunox, apalagi Lunox Gold Lane. Lunox dapat dengan mudah kabur dan menghindari serangan Harith ketika Harith menggunakan ultimate. Lunox juga dapat melakukan burst terus menerus kepada Harith.
Intinya, ultimate lunox memiliki 2 mode dan keduanya sangat merugikan harith. Tetapi tetap tergantung pada situasi game dan pengguna. Lunox tidak menang selamanya melawan Harith, tergantung bagaimana player menggunakan heronya dengan baik.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Before buying Magic Boots and Starlium Scythe (the first 2 items), it's better to play it safe and farm first. Because both items are needed so that Harith's ultimate does not have a cooldown so Harith can use skill 2 continuously.

Indonesia : Sebelum membeli Magic Boots dan Starlium Scythe (2 item pertama), lebih baik bermain aman dan farming terlebih dahulu. Karena kedua item tersebut dibutuhkan agar ultimate harith tidak memiliki cooldown sehingga Harith dapat menggunakan skill 2 secara terus menerus.

Always use Harith's ultimate first before using other skills. The ultimate has a cooldown reduction that must be utilized so that Harith can continue to use his skills. And make sure you use other skills in Harith's ultimate area.

Indonesia : Selalu menggunakan ultimate Harith terlebih dahulu sebelum menggunakan skill lainnya. Ultimatenya memiliki cooldown reduction (pengurangan hitungan detik pada skill) yang harus di manfaatkan agar Harith dapat terus menggunakan skillnya. Dan pastikan Anda menggunakan skill lainnya didalam area ultimate Harith.

emblems.emblem_desc:
with this emblem set harith gets extra cooldown reduction which will help him in the early game, cheaper item prices (at a discount) and additional damage and mana.

Indonesia : Dengan set emblem ini harith mendapat extra cooldown reduction yang akan membantunya di early game, harga item yang lebih murah (di diskon) dan damage serta mana tambahan.

equips.equip_desc:
This build is often used, Harith can dash (skill 2) many times after buying 2 items, Magic Boots and Starlium Scythe.

Indonesia : Build ini sering digunakan, harith bisa melakukan dash (skill 2) berkali-kali setelah membeli 2 item yaitu Magic Boots dan Starlium Scythe.

hero.hero_overview:
Harith is a hero who has been meta lately. Harith became meta due to the buff on his second skill which speeds up movement when attacking his enemies.

Indonesia : Harith adalah hero yang sedang meta belakangan ini. Harith naik menjadi meta dikarenakan buff pada skill duanya yang mempercepat gerakan saat menyerang musuhnya.
hero.hero_strength:
Harith is easy to chase down enemies quickly, clears minions quickly, and rotates quite fast.

Indonesia : Harith mudah mengejar musuh dengan cepat, clear minion yang cepat, dan rotasi yang cukup cepat.
hero.hero_weakness:
Harith's weakness is in crowd control (stun, immobilize, silence, etc.)

Indonesia : Kelemahan harith ada pada crowd control (stun, immobilize, silence, dan lain lain)

spell.spell_desc:
Since Harith is very weak to Crowd Control effects. Then purify is the best spell choice for him. However, if the hero used by the enemy does not have many Crowd Control skills then the Flicker spell is a safer choice.

Indonesia : Dikarenakan harith sangat lemah terhadap efek Crowd Control. Maka purify adalah pilihan spell terbaik untuknya. Namun jika hero yang digunakan musuh tidak memiliki banyak skill Crowd Control maka spell Flicker adalah pilihan yang lebih aman.

hero.hero_overview: Harith is the guard in a moniyan empire she is the burst hero in mlbb with crowed control and high damage her perfect role is exp , mid lane , gold, or jungle.
hero.hero_strength: Harith strength, early game rotate enemys farm and keep collecting gold from minions from exp lane to mid lane as she reach level 4 she is fine with team fights participation the boots and 10% cooldown reduction and another cooldown reduction is good for harith's early game for fighting
hero.hero_weakness: Harith weakness. hariths weakness against assasin like: harley, saber, gusion. These heroes could fight harith in early game to mid game harith could beat up squishy heroes not against other heroes with high mobility and tanky builds.

spell.spell_desc: Aegis is good for harith's early game potential since harith is the burst and high damage but she is squishy. It's best for him to have aegis since in early game she doesn't have much damage these aegies help harith survival and early game fights.

emblems.emblem_desc: Mage emblem is the best for harith. Inspire talent makes his dash cooldown almost non existent during ult. Weapon master talent helps harith to dish out more damage in late game. And finally impure rage is really important this talent makes allow harith to stay in lane to fight or farm for longer due to mana regeneration it provided.

equips.equip_desc: This build makes harith absolute monster. Magic boots lower his second skill cooldown. Starlium Scythe have really good synergy with harith since you will use basic attack after using second skill. Feather of Heaven helps harith to hit faster after dashing this makes his overall damage output higher. Holy Crystal to increase his damage capabilities. Divine Glaive to penetrate high defense hero. And lastly Blood Wings helps harith sustain longer during fight not to mention this item also increase his damage.

hero.hero_overview: Harith is a hero that can dish out a lot of damage while being able to sustain a decent amount
hero.hero_strength: Harith strength lies on his high movement and damage capabailities. Combine this with shield he got when dashing makes harith a monster when it comes to laning.
hero.hero_weakness: Harith weakness is hero that can stop his dashing such as minshitar. Harith main damage came from his second skill and minshitar can stop harith doing damage on crucial team fight.

spell.spell_desc: Harith have 3 different spell to use. First spell that he can use is vengeance this spell mainly use to counter attack speed based hero. Second spell is purify this spell used to counter team that has a lot of cc. Lastly third spell is aegis this spell can be used to counter burst damage hero.

hero.hero_overview: Harith was given the rank of lieutenant and will soon be appointed as an Imperial Master of Magic of the Moniyan Empire
hero.hero_strength:
Dash: Harith dashes towards a designated direction and steals Magic Power from nearby enemies
Shield: Harith generates a shield that can absorb at least 185 damage
Enhanced Basic Attack: Harith's enhanced Basic Attack deals Magic Damage and slows enemies by 40%
Chrono Dash cooldown reduction: Hitting an enemy with Harith's enhanced Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Chrono Dash by 3 seconds
hero.hero_weakness:
Early game: Harith's primary focus is to farm in the early game. 
Mid to late game: Harith becomes a crucial damage dealer for the team. 
Ultimate: Wait for the right time to use Harith's ultimate to maximize its cooldown reduction effect. Ensure that it covers the entire duration of the battle. 
Chrono Dash: If Harith comes into contact with the rift using Chrono Dash, he will absorb the energy within and reduce the cooldown of Chrono Dash by 3s

spell.spell_desc:
Synchro Fission
Harith creates a phantom of himself and releases Synchro Fission towards it, dealing Magic Damage to enemies. When the two energy waves collide, they explode, dealing more Magic Damage to enemies. 
Chrono Dash
Harith dashes towards a designated direction, stealing Magic Attack from nearby enemies. He also generates a shield that absorbs damage and enhances his next basic attack. 
Zaman Force
Harith summons the Zaman Force, which creates a Multidimensional Rift that slows nearby enemies. The rift also reduces the cooldown of Chrono Dash

dominants.dominant_desc: Kite the enemy with first skill and second but estimate your damage output and enemy position. Focus fiest on getting the first item for maximum earlygame

emblems.emblem_desc: For best damage and mana regen, fast equipments and lower cooldown

equips.equip_desc: Burst damae plus fast dash movement and decent attack speed

spell.spell_desc: You can also use Purify. Its initially just to avoid being the main target
